name: Shiller Cyclically Adjusted PE Ratio
notes: Shiller's headline CAPE (P/E10) ratio computed from S&P 500 real price ÷ 10-year average real earnings. Sourced from the Yale ie_data.xls workbook (http://www.econ.yale.edu/~shiller/data/ie_data.xls). Long-history monthly back to 1881. Wired §3.13 2026-06-10 — parser verified offline against the documented sheet layout; live cross-validation pending the first credentialed CI run (sandbox blocks Yale + the shillerdata.com / datahub.io / posix4e mirrors).

name: S&P 500 Composite Price (Shiller monthly)
notes: Monthly S&P Composite price level from the Yale ie_data.xls workbook. Long-history common-frame counterpart to daily SPX tickers; back to Jan 1871. Wired §3.13 2026-06-10 — cross-validation pending live CI run.

name: S&P 500 Dividend (Shiller monthly)
notes: Monthly S&P Composite trailing dividend from the Yale ie_data.xls workbook. Back to Jan 1871. Wired §3.13 2026-06-10 — cross-validation pending live CI run.

name: S&P 500 Earnings (Shiller monthly)
notes: Monthly S&P Composite trailing earnings from the Yale ie_data.xls workbook. Back to Jan 1871. Used as the denominator anchor for the CAPE definition. Wired §3.13 2026-06-10 — cross-validation pending live CI run.

name: US CPI (Shiller monthly 1871+)
notes: Long-run US CPI from the Yale ie_data.xls workbook (BLS CPI-U linked to Warren-Pearson back to 1871). Pre-1913 portion is not BLS-native but Shiller's standard splice; intended as a pre-WW2 cross-validation anchor for regime-AA Phase 0c, NOT a replacement for the modern BLS CUSR0000SA0 column (which remains the canonical USA_CPI_INDEX). Wired §3.13 2026-06-10.

name: US 10Y Long Rate (Shiller monthly 1871+)
notes: Long-run US 10-year Treasury yield from the Yale ie_data.xls workbook (FRED GS10 spliced to NBER long-rate series pre-1953). Pre-1953 portion is not FRED-native; intended as a pre-WW2 cross-validation anchor for regime-AA Phase 0c. Wired §3.13 2026-06-10.
